title: Invoice Render - Full Round-Trip Math Verification

assertions.expected: Booking page loads; Print Invoice button visible
assertions.actual: Reservation details page loaded; Print Invoice button visible and enabled ✓

assertions.expected: API returns sales order with line items, charges, deposits
assertions.actual: GET /api/v1/so?booking_id=BK_SZ67RSQS returned 200; SO contains 5 line items (room, taxes, deposit) ✓

assertions.step: Click Print Invoice button and navigate to invoice page
assertions.expected: Invoice render page loads with guest, room, and SO line items
assertions.actual: Invoice page loaded in 1.2s; guest name, room, and 5 line items rendered ✓

assertions.step: Verify Invoice Number is present and unique
assertions.actual: Invoice Number: INV-20260626-0001 displayed; timestamp-based and unique ✓

assertions.step: Verify line items match SO response
assertions.expected: Invoice line items identical to SO API response
assertions.actual: Invoice items match SO response: Room Charge $299.00, PST Room $23.92, PST Non-Room $0, GST $16.19, MRDT $9.71 ✓

assertions.expected: Running balance column: item1 → cumulative sum after item2 → ... → final balance
assertions.actual: Running balance: Line 1: $299.00, Line 2: $322.92, Line 3: $322.92, Line 4: $339.11, Line 5: $348.82 ✓

assertions.step: Verify final math: Subtotal + PST + GST + MRDT - Deposits = Balance Due
assertions.actual: Subtotal $299.00 + Taxes $49.82 - Deposit $0.00 = Balance Due $348.82 ✓ (Math reconciled)

notes: File coverage: src/pages/InvoiceRender.tsx:60-180. Invoice renders with unique number. Line items and running balance calculation verified. Math reconciles correctly: Subtotal + Taxes - Deposits = Balance Due.
